rulings.Case Title: MIREYA THUMAS VS. WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion An Dmotion For A Mabry Evidentiary Hearing And To Postpone Non-Judicial Foreclosure; Memo
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, May 1, 2012, line 2. PLAINTIFF MIREYA THUMAS' Motion For A Mabry Evidentiary Hearing And To Postpone Non-Judicial Foreclosure. Deny. Moving party failed to provide any evidence of defendants' non-compliance with CC 2923.5. 1) Moving papers refers to declaration must establish violation, paragraph 5 line 11 but no such declaration was filed, and; 2) Moving party failed to comply with court order of April 20, 2012 paragraph 8 and San Francisco Local Rule 2.6b. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: GAETANI REAL ESTATE, INC. VS. WILLIAM A. BOLANOS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, May 1, 2012, line 3. DEFENDANT WILLIAM BOLANOS' MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND. Grant, subject to opposition. = (501/REQ)
